Metadata.title: NeuralCraft – AI Consulting for Businesses
Metadata.description: NeuralCraft partners with businesses of every size as a long-term technology partner, turning artificial intelligence into practical, measurable value.

HomePage.heroTitle: Artificial intelligence that moves the needle
HomePage.heroSubtitle: NeuralCraft builds AI strategies, agents, and automations that create real value for businesses of every size.
HomePage.servicesTitle: One partner, six levers for your AI success
HomePage.servicesSubtitle: From the first strategy session to a production AI system — we cover the full journey.
HomePage.processSubtitle: A clear, iterative process — not months of concept papers.
HomePage.caseStudiesSubtitle: A selection of representative projects — real client work is added continuously.
HomePage.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk through a free, no-obligation consultation to find where AI has the biggest leverage in your business.

measurable.title: Measurable value
measurable.description: Every project starts with a clear success metric — no experimenting on your budget.

partnership.title: Long-term partnership
partnership.description: We don't just ship a project — we stay for operations, iteration, and scaling.

practical.title: Practice over theory
practical.description: Working solutions in weeks, not year-long strategy decks that never ship.

accessible.title: Built for any company size
accessible.description: From trade businesses to mid-market — solutions that fit your budget and scale.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We understand your processes, data, and goals — on-site or remote.

strategize.title: Strategize
strategize.description: Together we build a prioritized AI roadmap with clear milestones.

build.title: Build
build.description: Our team develops and integrates the solution — from agents to automation.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: We optimize, train your team, and expand the solution with intent.

strategy.title: AI Strategy & Consulting
strategy.description: Analysis of existing processes and a prioritized roadmap for AI adoption.
strategy.lead: Before we write a single line of code, we make sure we understand where AI actually moves the needle in your business.

highlights.point1: Process analysis and identification of the highest-impact use cases
highlights.point2: Prioritized roadmap with realistic effort estimates
highlights.point3: Clear success metrics defined before the project starts

agenticAi.title: Agentic AI Solutions
agenticAi.description: Custom AI agents for customer service, knowledge management, and internal processes.
agenticAi.lead: We build AI agents that don't just respond — with real tool access, they act on their own within clearly defined boundaries.

highlights.point1: Integration with existing systems (CRM, inventory, internal tools)
highlights.point2: Clear escalation logic — the agent knows when to hand off to a human
highlights.point3: Ongoing monitoring and iteration after go-live

automation.title: Workflow Automation
automation.description: Automating recurring business processes with AI and no-/low-code tools.
automation.lead: We automate recurring processes wherever it pays off — using the right tool for the job, not a fixed dogma.

highlights.point2: Seamless integration with existing systems and data sources
highlights.point3: Scales from individual sub-steps to complex, end-to-end workflows

chatbots.title: Chatbots & AI Assistants
chatbots.description: Intelligent assistants for your website, customer service, and internal tools.
chatbots.lead: Assistants that resolve real requests, instead of just repeating FAQ answers.

highlights.point1: Available around the clock, via website, WhatsApp, or internal tools
highlights.point2: Seamless handoff to human staff whenever needed
highlights.point3: Continuously improves from real customer conversations

aiCoding.title: AI Coding & Software Development
aiCoding.description: AI-powered web applications, internal tools, and platforms for your business.
aiCoding.lead: We build the software foundation your AI solutions run on in production — clean, maintainable, and built to scale.

highlights.point1: Modern, maintainable architecture instead of technical debt
highlights.point2: From internal tools to customer-facing platforms
highlights.point3: Works closely alongside your existing team where needed

training.title: AI Training & Workshops
training.description: Hands-on workshops that turn your team into confident AI users.
training.lead: Technology only pays off if your team can use it confidently — knowledge transfer is part of every project we run.

highlights.point1: Hands-on workshops instead of dry theory
highlights.point2: Tailored to your actual tools and processes
highlights.point3: Enables your team to keep improving after the project ends

ServicesPage.title: Six levers for your AI success
ServicesPage.lead: From the first strategy session to a production AI system — we cover the full journey.

manufacturing.title: AI-assisted quote generation
manufacturing.description: An AI agent reads technical inquiries, matches them against the product catalog, and drafts a ready-to-send quote.

craft.title: Automated appointment coordination
craft.result: 3 fewer hours on the phone per employee, per week
craft.description: A chat assistant handles customer inquiries, checks capacity, and suggests matching appointment slots around the clock.

consulting.title: Automated document review
consulting.result: +40% faster first-pass review of submitted documents
consulting.description: A workflow extracts relevant figures from submitted documents and flags anomalies for manual review.

BlogPage.lead: Practical writing on AI strategy, automation, and software development.

DevDashboard.title: Dev Dashboard
DevDashboard.lead: Internal developer overview of project status, architecture, and quality metrics.

statusCard.title: Project Status
statusCard.nextStepValue: Quality assurance and closing report for Phase 8

quality.title: Quality Status
quality.note: Reflects the last local verification (lint/typecheck/build) before this commit — not live monitoring.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui on Base UI

contentLayer.title: Content Layer
contentLayer.description: Velite – typed Markdown collections for blog posts, case studies, and job postings

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: next-intl with German, English, and Farsi (RTL), locale-prefixed routes

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Vercel-ready, statically pre-rendered routes via generateStaticParams

AboutPage.title: People who make AI understandable and usable
AboutPage.lead: NeuralCraft is a small, specialized team helping businesses of every size put artificial intelligence to practical, responsible use.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Our mission is to make artificial intelligence useful for businesses of every size — not as a buzzword, but as a practical tool that demonstrably saves time, cuts costs, and opens up new possibilities.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: We envision a future where small and mid-sized businesses can access the same AI-driven advantages as large corporations — supported by a partner who understands both the technology and the realities of running a business.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We communicate openly about what's possible — and what isn't (yet). No black-box promises.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: We take responsibility for the outcomes of our work, not just for shipping code.

curiosity.title: Curiosity
curiosity.description: We stay close to how the technology evolves — and pass that knowledge on to our clients.

pragmatism.title: Pragmatism
pragmatism.description: The best solution is the one that actually runs in production — not the most technically elegant one.

AboutPage.technologyLead: We're deliberately technology-agnostic and pick the right approach for each task instead of a single favorite vendor.

llmAgentic.title: LLM & Agentic AI
llmAgentic.description: Language models and agent frameworks for intelligent automation.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Workflow engines spanning no-code to fully custom process automation.

development.title: Development
development.description: Modern, maintainable foundations for web applications and internal tools.

cloud.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Scalable, production-ready operations — independent of any single vendor.

AboutPage.whyTitle: What sets us apart from a typical agency

oneTeam.title: One team, not a subcontractor chain
oneTeam.description: Senior experts stay with your project from the first analysis to production operation.

techAgnostic.title: Technology-agnostic
techAgnostic.description: No lock-in to a single AI vendor — we choose what genuinely fits your use case.

strategyToCode.title: From strategy to code
strategyToCode.description: Consulting and implementation sit under one roof — no gap between concept and execution.

resultsOverBuzzwords.title: Results over buzzwords
resultsOverBuzzwords.description: Clear success metrics instead of marketing speak, from day one.

ContactPage.title: Let's talk
ContactPage.lead: Tell us about your project — we'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.

form.title: Send a message
form.privacyLabel: I have read the <link>privacy policy</link> and agree to the processing of my data.
form.successBody: We've received your inquiry and will get back to you shortly.
form.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again later or email us directly.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.companyTooLong: The company name is too long.
errors.messageRequired: Your message should be at least 10 characters long.
errors.messageTooLong: The message is too long (max. 4000 characters).
errors.privacyRequired: Please agree to the privacy policy.

ImprintPage.title: Imprint
ImprintPage.lead: Legal disclosure pursuant to Section 5 of the German Telemedia Act (TMG).
ImprintPage.disclaimer: Legal notice: this page contains placeholder information and does not constitute individual legal advice. Before going live, all details must be replaced with the actual company data and reviewed by a qualified lawyer.

provider.title: Provider
provider.body: NeuralCraft, [Placeholder: full legal company name and entity type], [Placeholder: street, number, postal code, city, country].

responsible.title: Responsible for content
responsible.body: Responsible for content per Section 55(2) of the German Interstate Broadcasting Treaty (RStV): [Placeholder: name of the responsible person].

disputeResolution.title: EU dispute resolution
disputeResolution.body: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

liability.title: Liability for content and links
liability.body: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law, per Section 7(1) TMG. We are not obliged to permanently monitor external linked content without concrete evidence of a legal violation; the operators of linked external sites are solely responsible for their own content.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.body: Content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Third-party contributions are marked as such.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.lead: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to Article 13 GDPR.
PrivacyPage.disclaimer: Legal notice: this privacy policy is a structured template and does not constitute individual legal advice. Before going live, all details (especially hosting and the data controller) must be completed and reviewed by a qualified lawyer.

overview.title: Overview
overview.body: This privacy policy explains which personal data we process when you visit this website, and what rights you have in relation to that processing.

controller.title: Data controller
controller.body: The data controller for this website is NeuralCraft, [Placeholder: address], email: hello@neuralcraft.ai.

dataCollected.title: What data we collect
dataCollected.body: When you visit this website, we automatically collect technical access data (server logs), as well as data you voluntarily submit through the contact form: name, email address, optionally your company, and your message.

purpose.title: Purpose of processing
purpose.body: We process this data to respond to your inquiries and to operate and secure the website reliably.

legalBasis.title: Legal basis
legalBasis.body: Processing is based on Article 6(1)(b) GDPR (steps prior to entering into a contract) and Article 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in the secure and reliable operation of the website).

retention.title: Retention period
retention.body: We retain personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described above, or as required by statutory retention obligations.

items.access: Access to the data we hold about you (Art. 15 GDPR)
items.complaint: Lodging a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR)

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: This website uses only strictly necessary cookies, for example to store your language preference. We do not set any tracking or marketing cookies. A notice about this is shown on your first visit.

contactForm.title: Contact form
contactForm.body: When you use the contact form, we process the data you provide solely to handle your inquiry. We do not share it with third parties.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.body: [Placeholder: details of the hosting provider and server location].

contact.title: Privacy contact
contact.body: For privacy-related questions, please contact: hello@neuralcraft.ai · [Placeholder: name of the data protection officer, if appointed].

CookieNotice.label: Cookie notice
CookieNotice.message: This website uses only strictly necessary cookies (e.g. to store your language preference). See our <link>privacy policy</link> for details.

NotFound.title: This page couldn't be found
NotFound.lead: The link may be outdated, or the page may have moved.

ErrorPage.title: Something went wrong
ErrorPage.lead: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the homepage.

Footer.tagline: Your long-term technology partner for practical, measurable AI.
